_meta.keyKnowledge: We investigate how artists across cultures and times develop personal expression to communicate ideas, challenge perspectives and achieve specific purposes.

_source.w: We investigate how artists across cultures and times develop personal expression to communicate ideas, challenge perspectives and achieve specific purposes.
y: Studying how artists develop personal expression across contexts reveals the diverse possibilities of visual art.
Understanding the relationship between personal expression and cultural context enriches our own practice.
This knowledge provides the foundation for informed, sophisticated engagement with contemporary art.
eg: We research how specific artists developed their personal practice within cultural and historical contexts.
We investigate the relationship between art, society and the ideas of specific periods or movements.
We analyse how artists use their work to challenge perspectives and provoke dialogue.
We study how art serves different functions — aesthetic, political, spiritual, commemorative — across cultures.
We explore how globalisation and technology have influenced contemporary art practice.
We compare artistic approaches from different traditions and evaluate their significance.
